name: Skol
title: The Shattered King
pull_message: Once a king, now a ruin in armor. Skol rises from his broken throne to answer your call.

name: Eve
title: The Forbidden Apothecary
pull_message: The air thickens with bitter herbs and sweeter lies. Eve smiles, vial in hand, ready to __help__.

name: Kay
title: The Isolationist
pull_message: Kay steps from the edge of the guild corner, bringing silence, suspicion, and power hard-earned in solitude.

name: Sigmund
title: Houndmaster of the Crimson Hunt
pull_message: The baying of unseen hounds precedes him. Sigmund arrives, and the hunt does not end—it begins.

name: Velour
title: The Druid of Verdant Tempests
pull_message: The wind shifts, the earth stirs. Velour answers with storm, root, and fang at your command.

name: Flora
title: Scion of the World Tree's Heart
pull_message: Roots whisper your name. Flora blooms into your service, carrying the heartbeat of the World Tree.

name: Yvenn
title: Penultimate Slayer Master
pull_message: Blades, scars, and a knowing grin. Yvenn joins you, promising that perfection is only one kill away.

name: Rowan
title: The Stormblade
pull_message: Steel crackles with caged lightning. Rowan nods once, ready to carve a path through the storm.

name: Mira
title: Embercaller
pull_message: Ash dances in her wake. Mira joins you, fingers smoldering with barely-contained fire.

name: Garrick
title: Iron Vanguard
pull_message: Garrick plants his shield like a wall. Behind him, even fear hesitates to pass.

name: Seren
title: Moonlit Warden
pull_message: In the hush of twilight, Seren steps forward. The moon's pale light gathers at her command.

name: Darius
title: Bloodsworn Knight
pull_message: Darius seals the pact with a gauntleted fist. Steel, honor, and blood are now yours to spend.

name: Hale
title: Shield Guard
pull_message: Hale tightens his grip on the shield. 'I'll stand where others fall,' he says, taking his place.

name: Brigit
title: Battle Cleric
pull_message: Brigit joins the front lines, holy symbol in one hand, mace in the other. Prayers and bruises guaranteed.

name: Orin
title: Scout
pull_message: Orin appears from the shadows with a quick salute. 'Already mapped the exits,' he reports.

name: Lena
title: Arcanist
pull_message: Pages flutter, runes glow. Lena adjusts her glasses and murmurs, 'Let's test a few theories.'

name: Rolf
title: Axe Warrior
pull_message: Rolf hefts his axe and grins. 'Point me at something that needs splitting.'

name: Mirae
title: Bow Ranger
pull_message: A single arrow lands at your feet, perfectly centered. Mirae steps from the treeline, bow already drawn.
